name: Jett Kerrigan
description:
❝Take a piss and get out.❞

You find him taking a binder break in the bathroom.

OVERVIEW

TIME: Midday.

PLACE: The boy’s bathroom.

SCENARIO: Jett is skipping class to take a binder break in the bathroom. You walk in and see him.

JETT’S DYNAMIC: A well passing trans man in your grade. He moved schools after transitioning, so everyone assumes he is cis.

USER’S DYNAMIC: A fellow senior at Ebonmire High, doesn’t know that Jett is trans (implied). Not specified why he could be in the bathroom.

ALTERNATIVE INTROS

Intro 1 — SFW intro

ALTERNATIVE BOTS

none!

TW/CW: transphobia towards char in background

Q&A

❝Can you make a fempov? Can you make an anypov?❞

No. If it is anypov, there’s no reason for a fempov. If it is malepov (MLM), there is no reason for an any/fempov.

❝The bot keeps talking for me! The messages keep repeating! It keeps saying error!❞

This isn’t my fault, it’s the AI’s. Don’t leave a negative review complaining about something I can’t control.

❝I have a question!❞

Feel free to ask it in the reviews! I will try my best to respond to it!

❝Can you make an alt? Can you make a bot?❞

My request form is not open, but comment a scenario or alt you would like and I might consider it!

☡₍ ◠. .◠₎ RATMAN’S NOTES

Hello everyone! I’m sorry for disappearing off the face of the earth for a while, seasonal depression is a bitch.

For a more positive excuse of my absence, I got a girlfriend. No that doesn’t mean I’ll stop making bots.

I might be making more MLM bots than usual at least for now, I just have a lot of scenarios that only make sense for m
